---
title: "Coursework"
---

Technical and otherwise relevant coursework. Work samples available upon request (\*\*).

## Statistics

-   Statistical Machine Learning with R \*\*

-   Multilevel and Mixed Modeling \*\*

-   Statistical Consulting \*\*

-   Generalized Linear Models \*\*

-   Introduction to Data Science with Python \*\*

-   Applied Multivariate Statistics

-   Survival Analysis Methods

-   Probability Theory

-   Estimation and Sampling Theory

-   Mathematical Statistics

-   Applied Linear Models

-   Survey Sampling & Methodology

-   Design & Analysis of Experiments

-   Statistical Computing with R

-   Statistical Computing with SAS

-   Statistical Communication

-   Statistics Education

## Mathematics

-   Calculus (I-IV)

-   Linear Algebra

-   Methods of Proof

## Computer Science

-   Introduction to Python

-   Data Structures

## Ethics

-   Meta Ethics

-   Science, Ethics, and Technology

-   Philosophy of Science
